reasoning: Requirement 11.4.2 focuses on enabling security monitoring and threat detection, which aligns with Kubernetes audit logging and admission control capabilities. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture security-related events, and admission controllers can enforce security policies and log violations. These functions ensure that Kubernetes clusters have mechanisms for monitoring and detecting security threats, similar to cloud security services like GuardDuty or Security Command Center.
title: Requirement 11.4.2
